videos.title: Forehand Technique for Beginners - Unit Turn and Contact Point
videos.description: Step-by-step forehand tutorial covering the unit turn, contact point in front of the body, and proper follow-through.

videos.title: Tennis Forehand Power - Body Rotation and Kinetic Chain
videos.description: How to generate forehand power through the kinetic chain, hip rotation, and weight transfer without arming the ball.

videos.title: One-Handed and Two-Handed Backhand Tutorial
videos.description: Choosing between one-handed and two-handed backhand, shoulder turn technique, and hitting with the right contact point.

videos.title: Backhand Topspin - Drive and Slice Variations
videos.description: Developing a reliable backhand with topspin drive and slice options, including when to use each variation in rallies.

videos.title: Tennis Serve Technique - Flat, Slice and Kick Serve
videos.description: Complete serve guide covering flat serve pronation, slice serve angle, and kick serve brush-up motion with toss placement.

videos.title: Serve Toss Consistency - Stop Double Faulting
videos.description: How to develop a consistent serve toss, arm motion, and release point. Fixes common double fault issues.

videos.title: Tennis Volley Technique - Punch Volley and Drop Volley
videos.description: Net play fundamentals including compact punch volleys, soft drop volleys, split step timing, and overhead smash technique.

videos.title: Approach Shot and Net Play - Serve and Volley Pattern
videos.description: How to construct points at the net using approach shots, serve-and-volley patterns from pro match examples.

videos.title: Return of Serve Masterclass - Split Step and Compact Swing
videos.description: How to read the serve direction, time the split step, and use a compact swing to neutralize or attack the serve.

videos.title: Tennis Footwork Fundamentals - Split Step and Recovery
videos.description: Essential footwork patterns including split step timing, lateral slides, crossover steps, and recovery to center court.

videos.title: Court Movement and Agility Drills for Tennis
videos.description: Spider drill, cone drills, and shadow footwork exercises for improving court coverage and movement efficiency.

videos.title: Tennis Strategy - Point Construction and Shot Selection
videos.description: How to build points strategically, use cross-court to down-the-line patterns, and adapt your game plan to different opponents.

videos.title: Pro Match Analysis - Tactics and Patterns Explained
videos.description: Breaking down pro match tactics, serve+1 patterns, and how top players construct points and exploit weaknesses.

videos.title: Inside-Out Forehand - The Most Powerful Tennis Pattern
videos.description: How to run around backhand to hit inside-out forehands, footwork for the pattern, and when to use it in match play.

videos.title: Tennis Serve Power and Spin - Advanced Serving Tips
videos.description: Advanced serve mechanics for generating more power and spin, including trophy position, racket drop, and full pronation.

videos.title: Tennis Volley Drills - Quick Hands at the Net
videos.description: Quick volley drill variations for developing fast hands, reflex volleys, and proper ready position at the net.

videos.title: Tennis for Beginners - Complete Start to Play Guide
videos.description: Complete beginner guide covering grips, basic forehand and backhand, court positioning, and how to start playing rallies.
